questions.question: Describe the difference between a bus topology and a star topology. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Both bus and star topologies are used in LANs. However, in a bus topology, all devices are connected to a single cable, whereas in a star topology, all devices are connected to a central device.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a packet switching method and a circuit switching method? (5 marks)
questions.hint: In packet switching, data is transmitted in packets, and each packet is routed independently. In contrast, circuit switching reserves a dedicated communication path between the sender and receiver.

questions.question: Explain the concept of OSI model layers. (5 marks)
questions.hint: The OSI model consists of seven layers: Physical, Data Link, Network, Transport, Session, Presentation, and Application. Each layer has specific functions and protocols that enable data communication between devices.
